content.en:
VisualCube Customization

0) Download files https://drive.google.com/open?id=1WaM7SyEVUQj8NnWscMycGjrVq3Kuluk1, install PHPStudy (only CHS version), 安装目录不能有中文和空格. It's a PHP debugging environment of the program integration package. Close VPN.

1) Open PHPStudy, Click首页-套件-启动Apache-启动FTP-启动MySQL-重启Apache (Front Page – Start Apache - Start FTP - Start MySQL - Restart Apache);

2) Click网站-创建网站-基本配置 (Website - Create Website - General Setting), define域名(domain) as vc.com, click 确认 (Confirm). Click管理-打开根目录 (Manage - Open Root Directory), Put VisualCube file in it;

3) Type http://vc.com/index.php?fmt=svg&&sch=ygrwbo&stage=TEC_FR&case=R U' R2' U R in URL in the browser. You would see an NF2L image. This process can be done offline.

4) Stage Customization: Open index.php, search "Stage Def", and add your customized stages.

注意：必须退出代理软件！

content.zh:
VisualCube自定义

0) 下载https://share.weiyun.com/5Q8O5kE 中的文件 (UltraEdit, PHPStudy 8.0.7), 并安装UltraEdit, PHPStudy. 务必关闭VPN. 请勿使用新版本PHPStudy, 因为新版没有MySQL8.

1) 打开PHPStudy, 首页-套件-启动Apache-启动FTP-启动MySQL-重启Apache;

2) 网站-创建网站-基本配置, 定义域名vc.com, 确认. 点击管理-打开根目录, 将VisualCube文件夹内的所有文件放入该目录;

3) 浏览器地址栏输入http://vc.com/index.php?fmt=svg&sch=ygrwbo&stage=TEC_FR&case=R U' R2' U R. 若能显示魔方图片, 则表示设置成功, 可离线操作.

4) 设置阶段遮罩: 用UltraEdit打开index.php, 快捷键CTRL+F搜索Stage Def, 然后添加.
